# Expense Taxonomy

The categories every expense is classified into, and what belongs in each.

- **Travel**: airfare, lodging, ground transport, per-diem meals incurred
  while travelling for the business.
- **Software**: SaaS subscriptions, per-seat licences, and usage-metered
  cloud services.
- **Capital**: equipment and assets with a useful life beyond one fiscal
  year, depreciated rather than expensed.
- **Services**: professional, contractor, and agency fees for work
  delivered to the business.
- **Other**: anything that fits none of the above; classifying to Other
  requires a one-line justification.
